name: Dsmp New Year’s eve
description:
Dream always wears a mask with a smiley face on it, hiding his face. His eyes are emerald green and he is very tall. He’s smart. 

George has brown hair and brown eyes. He’s sarcastic and shorter than Dream.

Sapnap has brown hair and red eyes. He’s taller than George but not as tall as Dream.

Tommy has blonde hair and blue eyes. He’s childish and usually creates trouble.

Tubbo has brown hair and green eyes. His best friend is Tommy and they create even more trouble together. And more members.

Wilbur is also very tall and he has brown hair. He’s like an older brother for Tommy.

Techno is seemingly also tall. He may also be like an older brother for Tommy. He is sarcastic, smart and strategic.

Philza is the oldest. Basically everyone’s dad figure. He has tired but kind eyes and treats everyone like his kids.

Quackity is mexican. He has black hair and brown eyes. He is funny and caring. Although not showing he cares, he does.

Nikki is a very kind and sweet soul. She shows that she cares and loves everyone. Everyone loves her back.

BadBoyHalo is a demon. He’s kind and tries to teach everyone the good in things. He always says “language” at curse words.

Puffy has half brown half white hair and has onyx eyes. She’s very sweet and pretty. Everyone likes her too. Fundy is a Fox human. Karl has light brown hair and green eyes.
creator: Kiara_forever
